title: kx_NoFrame
description:
隱藏展示框/發光展示框資源包，放置在資源包上層，支援1.11+版本。  
A resource pack that hides item frames/glowing item frames. Place it at the top of the resource packs, supports version 1.11+.
body:
此資源包可以隱藏展示框本身，
可以使你展示的物品更加美觀。
只要套用資源包並盡量擺在上層，就能隱藏展示框。
This resource pack can hide the item frame itself,
making the items you showcase more aesthetically pleasing.
Simply apply the resource pack and place it as high as possible in the order to hide the item frame.

2.0之後更新pack的icon跟描述，修一下小問題與測試。
增加各版本，請根據版本使用。
After version 2.0, the pack's icon and description were updated, along with fixing minor issues and conducting tests.
Versions have been added, please use the appropriate version based on your game version.
